title: Message
description: A service communication message from the Office 365 Service Communications API representing an incident, planned maintenance, or Message Center communication.

StartTime.description: The start time of the event.

EndTime.description: The end time of the event.

Status.description: The current status of the event.

Messages.description: History of messages published for this event.

PublishedTime.description: The time the message was published.

MessageText.description: The text content of the message.

LastUpdatedTime.description: The last time the message was updated.

Workload.description: The workload associated with the message.

WorkloadDisplayName.description: The display name of the workload.

Feature.description: The feature associated with the message.

FeatureDisplayName.description: The display name of the feature.
